headline: Las Vegas Sands Corp. entered into new five-year employment agreements with newly appointed CEO Patrick Dumont, CFO Randy Hyzak, and General Counsel D. Zachary Hudson.
investor_impact: These agreements secure the long-term commitment of the core executive leadership team through March 2031, providing operational stability following the recent CEO transition. The compensation structures heavily emphasize performance-based cash and equity incentives, strongly aligning management's financial interests with long-term shareholder value creation.
key_figures: March 1, 2026: Patrick Dumont appointed Chairman, CEO, President and Treasurer
March 2, 2031: Expiration date of the new employment terms
Patrick Dumont: $2,500,000 base salary, 250% target cash incentive, 725% target equity award
Randy Hyzak: $1,350,000 base salary, 200% target cash incentive, 250% target equity award
D. Zachary Hudson: $1,600,000 base salary, 200% target cash incentive, 425% target equity award
